theme_archetype.public_site: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Light Theme with EdTech Soft Dark Mode

headings.sizing: H1: text-5xl md:text-6xl, H2: text-4xl md:text-5xl, H3: text-2xl md:text-3xl

public_site.gradient_usage: Use selectively as a text-clip mask for key headlines or a subtle 10% opacity wash behind the hero. DO NOT use as a flat full-screen background.

layout_spacing.spacing_scale: p-8, p-12, p-16 (Generous spacing for public sections)
layout_spacing.public_grid: Mode A (Tetris Grid) for marketing sections. Use asymmetry and wide gaps (gap-8).
layout_spacing.admin_grid: Mode B (Control Room Grid). Strict density, tight gaps (gap-4). Every pixel utilized.
layout_spacing.borders_and_radius: Public cards: rounded-2xl. Admin: rounded-lg. Soft shadows for public, sharp 1px borders for admin.

component_strategies.public_hybrid_rule: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts (Hero, Sections). Do NOT use Shadcn Card components for marketing. ONLY use Shadcn for interactive logic (Forms, Modals, Selects).
component_strategies.hero_section: Dynamic overlapping layout. Headline in Cabinet Grotesk. If using an image, overlay must be max bg-black/40. If using abstract gradient background, keep it clean with large floating CTA.
component_strategies.course_cards: Custom HTML/Tailwind. Max-h-48 image thumbnail. Content padded with p-6. Display rounded-full badges for duration, price, mode. Prominent Apply Now button matching brand gradient.
component_strategies.testimonial_layout: Bento Grid format. Quotes in text-xl bold. Subtle user details at bottom. Avoid center-everything disease.
component_strategies.sticky_cta: Fixed bottom right (z-50). Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70. One Green button (WhatsApp), one Brand Gradient button (Book Free Demo).
component_strategies.admin_sidebar: 250px fixed width, minimal dark theme. Active states use bg-white/10. Hide on mobile behind a hamburger menu.

ui_micro_themes.glassmorphism: Used for sticky public nav and sticky CTA. backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light), border-white/20.
ui_micro_themes.grid_borders: Used in Admin tables and dashboard stat cards. Expose the skeleton, 1px border-border/40.

testing_requirements.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='apply-now-btn').

hero_background.description: Abstract purple lines for tech background

students_collaboration.description: Group of students collaborating on a laptop

classroom_learning.description: Students learning in a classroom with laptops

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the font-families via Google Fonts/Fontshare in the index.html or global CSS.
Do not use Shadcn for the public marketing layout except for complex form interactions.
Implement the sticky CTA fixed at the bottom right corner of the viewport on all public pages.
Admin panel must be strictly dark mode by default using the provided dark color palette.
Build the Leads table in the admin panel using dense layout principles.
Ensure all data-testids are added as per rules.
All components must be .js files, NOT .tsx files.
